input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.3.2
            TITLE: the hvd ev.5.5 must be disconnected when vehicles are:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.3.2: The HVD EV.5.5 must be disconnected when vehicles are:
EV.11.3.2 The HVD EV.5.5 must be disconnected when vehicles are: 
a. Moved around the competition site 
b. Participating in Static Events

final_answer: The HVD EV.5.5 must be disconnected when vehicles are: a. Moved around the competition site b. Participating in Static Events
